plugins.name: gitgrit
plugins.description: Project-aware DevOps compliance enforcement for GitGrit-connected repositories. Stable channel; pinned to the latest tagged release.

plugins.name: gitgrit-dev
plugins.description: Internal/unstable build. Do not install in production. Tracks main; may break without notice. Requires a staging API token + staging MCP URL.

plugins.name: gitgrit-local
plugins.description: Local working-tree install for plugin developers running from the gitgrit repo. Not for customers.
